'''fokawaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eosinic|eosinic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-k-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eosinic|eosinic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| fokawaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokawithi|fokawithi]] || [[word:fokawiji|fokawiji]] || [[word:fokawishi|fokawishi]] || [[word:fokawiki|fokawiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokawuthuthu|fokawuthuthu]] || [[word:fokawujuju|fokawujuju]] || [[word:fokawushushu|fokawushushu]] || [[word:fokawukuku|fokawukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokawuthu|fokawuthu]] || [[word:fokawuju|fokawuju]] || [[word:fokawushu|fokawushu]] || [[word:fokawuku|fokawuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokawufthuf|fokawufthuf]] || [[word:fokawufjuf|fokawufjuf]] || [[word:fokawufshuf|fokawufshuf]] || [[word:fokawufkuf|fokawufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokawethe|fokawethe]] || [[word:fokaweje|fokaweje]] || [[word:fokaweshe|fokaweshe]] || [[word:fokaweke|fokaweke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokawothotho|fokawothotho]] || [[word:fokawojojo|fokawojojo]] || [[word:fokawoshosho|fokawoshosho]] || [[word:fokawokoko|fokawokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokawotho|fokawotho]] || [[word:fokawojo|fokawojo]] || [[word:fokawosho|fokawosho]] || [[word:fokawoko|fokawoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokawofthof|fokawofthof]] || [[word:fokawofjof|fokawofjof]] || [[word:fokawofshof|fokawofshof]] || [[word:fokawofkof|fokawofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfthÃŸf|fokawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfjÃŸf|fokawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfshÃŸf|fokawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfkÃŸf|fokawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|fokawÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|fokawÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|fokawÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|fokawÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfthÃŸf|fokawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfjÃŸf|fokawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfshÃŸf|fokawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfkÃŸf|fokawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfthÃŸf|fokawÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfjÃŸf|fokawÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfshÃŸf|fokawÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:fokawÃŸfkÃŸf|fokawÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:fokawÃḊthÃḊ|fokawÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:fokawÃḊjÃḊ|fokawÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:fokawÃḊshÃḊ|fokawÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:fokawÃḊkÃḊ|fokawÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:fokawathatha|fokawathatha]] || [[word:fokawajaja|fokawajaja]] || [[word:fokawashasha|fokawashasha]] || [[word:fokawakaka|fokawakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:fokawatha|fokawatha]] || [[word:fokawaja|fokawaja]] || [[word:fokawasha|fokawasha]] || [[word:fokawaka|fokawaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:fokawafthaf|fokawafthaf]] || [[word:fokawafjaf|fokawafjaf]] || [[word:fokawafshaf|fokawafshaf]] || [[word:fokawafkaf|fokawafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:fokawasha|fokawasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:fokawshÃḋsha|fokawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fokawrosha|fokawrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fokawmusha|fokawmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:fokawyasha|fokawyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofokawnkshÃḋsha|gofokawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofokawnkrosha|gofokawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofokawnkmusha|gofokawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofokawnkyasha|gofokawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:fokakawasha|fokakawasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fokakawshÃḋsha|fokakawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fokakawrosha|fokakawrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fokakawmusha|fokakawmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fokakawyasha|fokakawyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofokakawnkshÃḋsha|gofokakawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofokakawnkrosha|gofokakawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofokakawnkmusha|gofokakawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofokakawnkyasha|gofokakawnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:fekÃḊwasha|fekÃḊwasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fekÃḊwshÃḋsha|fekÃḊwshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fekÃḊwrosha|fekÃḊwrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fekÃḊwmusha|fekÃḊwmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fekÃḊwyasha|fekÃḊwyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofekÃḊwnkshÃḋsha|gofekÃḊwnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofekÃḊwnkrosha|gofekÃḊwnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofekÃḊwnkmusha|gofekÃḊwnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofekÃḊwnkyasha|gofekÃḊwnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:fokfawasha|fokfawasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:fokfawshÃḋsha|fokfawshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:fokfawrosha|fokfawrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:fokfawmusha|fokfawmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:fokfawyasha|fokfawyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gofokfawnkshÃḋsha|gofokfawnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gofokfawnkrosha|gofokfawnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gofokfawnkmusha|gofokfawnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gofokfawnkyasha|gofokfawnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|59e8839}}
